string 2: Is this Junomon...?{next}
Junomon's changed a lot...{next}
What happened to Junomon...?{next}

Hey, Junomon. Tell me this is all a cruel joke. You would
never sell out your own kin.
After you betrayed my trust, I lost my faith in everything.

I even came to doubt my own brother, when I heard that
Apollomon had joined forces with the Titans...

Me, joining the Titans?
This is the first I'm hearing of this rumor.

Come to think of it, it was really weird I never heard from you.
I sent messenger after messenger.
Messengers? I never received any messages...
What's going on here...?
Pumpkinmon...!
When I closed off my heart, you were my only confidant!

Oh, boy. Guess it's spoiler time, huh? But... you're just
a little too late...
All right... Do your thing!
...Chain Lash.
The divine oracle, Junomon...

Adored by Minervamon and many other Digimon, Junomon was
filled with joy as she looked forward to fulfilling her sacred duty...

...The duty of taking Iliad's Great Guardian under her wing, and helping
to raise him into his proper form. Junomon eagerly awaited his arrival.
And at long last, Junomon met the Great Guardian—

—but at that exact moment, the Titans began a massive invasion of
Iliad, and the pair were separated once again in the ensuing chaos.

From that day forward, the doors of Junomon's temple were
sealed shut, never to open again.
But what became of Junomon?

Will the day ever come when the temple doors open wide once more? Will the day
ever come when the divine oracle once again appears before the populace of Iliad?

Ah, finally with us again, are you? Gotta love that stupid
"worst wake-up call in the world" look on your mug!
You were playing us false this entire time?!
I trusted you...!

Running around stirring the pot with you none the wiser
was a real hoot!

Sorry, but I think I'm gonna keep standing idly by, waiting
for the end of the world...
Wait! Stop! They're not our enemies!
You're directing your grudge at the wrong target.
Isn't that right, Lord Titamon...?

It's been a while... child. At our last encounter, we fought
over the treasure, I believe.
Did you just say "Titamon"...?{next}
How did you get so small...?{next}
Someone sure got a lot cuter!{next}

Seems that's the price he paid for absorbing the power of
the treasure for a time. More importantly...

...aren't you surprised I'm still alive? Hmm? Luckily, we were
fighting within a dream, so I was able to come back.

We came here to free some imprisoned Titans on Lord
Plutomon's orders...

We'll get you guys out of here while we're at it. Titan or
otherwise, what does it matter now, right?

This one is... fierce. But to think the day would come when
we would be saved by Titans...

Minnie might be confined in this jail somewhere as well.
We must search...!
You two...!
Minerva!
We'll have you out of there in no time!
Here we go! One, two, three!
Raaaaaaagh!
Yaaaaaaah!
Sheesh... Just look how strong you two have gotten.

Still, you'd better not get too cocky... I don't plan on
falling behind the two of you just yet!
Sounds like a lot has happened while I've been locked up in here.
...It's been a while since I last saw you, too.
Yeah, it's been a while.{next}
Nice to see you again.{next}
I wish the others could see you, too.{next}
Wow, how long has it been, I wonder...?
...But this is no time for all this mushy stuff.

You probably already know this, but the one who locked me 
away here... was Junomon.

There's no need to hold back any longer. We have to do
this ourselves!
The two of us will head straight for the inner temple.

You two go back and let everyone know I'm all right,
and then urge them to get ready as fast as they can.

If I had to guess, I'd say we were close to the endgame...
and facing the real mastermind behind all of this.
Junomon...?

You are the Great Guardian... the Digimon charged with
the duty of defending this world...

How could you choose to protect that human
over our world? Are... you abandoning us?!
What're you talking about?{next}
You do not remember, do you?
It was I who watched over the egg...

So, too, was I the one who incubated it with the utmost
care, and the one who sent it to the human world...
All for the sake of your future.
After all of that... you would abandon me?!
YOU WOULD FORSAKE ME?!
As I thought... her sanity is...
It seems Junomon's formed a really unhealthy attachment to you.
You, the Great Guardian of this world.
...Wait. What?
You're not the Great Guardian, you say?
What are you talking about? You're the Digital World's—
YOU BELONG TO ME!
NGH... AAAAAAAAAGH!
AAAAAAAAAGH! AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAGH!
AAAAAAAAAGH! AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAGH!
Junomon?!
Wh-Who are you...?
The one who manipulated Plutomon.{next}
The one who turned Plutomon into a zombie!{next}
The one we saw in the Dark Field...{next}
What...?

You don't suppose it did the same thing to Junomon that it
did to Plutomon... do you?
Ngh...
I was having a bad dream... a never-ending nightmare...

It felt as though my consciousness had sunk to the bottom
of a great abyss...
I could barely make out everyone's voices...

So that means... you were being possessed by that
mysterious figure we just saw...?

It took advantage of the negative emotions within me... 
It wriggled its way in, and took over...

I became one with the sentiment left behind by the hero...
No, it would be more accurate to call it resentment.
The hero? You don't mean...!
Yes...
I speak of Chronomon.
The last Great Guardian of our world... was no hero at all...

To Chronomon, who had been sealed away in the device that
governs time, the only freedom left was self-destruction.

However, the higher being who rules over the world would
not allow that.

To make his self-destructive wish come true, Chronomon
needed to prepare a "gear" that would take his place.

To accomplish this, Chronomon created an egg to be his
replacement, a "hero who would save the world."
And Chronomon gave him the role of annihilating himself.
This was all planned, a setup.
I was being manipulated, and, in the end, aided in this plot...

Junomon loved and cherished the Great Guardian so much that she
could not hold back the feelings of jealousy that came from such love.

Chronomon's resentful will took advantage of the dark feelings in
Junomon's heart, wormed itself in, and turned her into a tragic puppet.

Junomon was able to regain her free will and break Chronomon's curse with
the help of her newly reunited companions and their strengthened bond.

The voices of those who revere and admire her strengthened
her resolve to fulfill her role as trusted priestess.
And then...

...Junomon spoke of the true threat looming over the
digital world—the false hero, Chronomon.

While possessed by Chronomon's will, Junomon learned
an important truth...

...Aegiomon was created by Chronomon, as a "replacement gear",
to fulfill his ultimate goal.

Aegiomon. So long as he remains fallen in darkness,
the Sacred Current is powerless.

No matter how much he grieves, Inori Misono will not return,
for she has fallen into the abyss of time and space.

To save her, you must descend into the abyss as well. 
Such a reunion... might be possible at the end of the world.

As the world grows more chaotic, her voice may reach you. 
Ironic that chaos also tends to breed miracles, no?

So there is hope. If you have the courage to press onward,
to face forward once again...

Go and meet Aegiomon, and deliver your message... for only
the voice of a loved one can save those fallen to darkness.
When I became one with that dark resentment of Chronomon's...
...I was consumed with a desire for death.
What do you mean?

Chronomon, the one who governs time, realized he was
but a single gear created by God.
The only freedom he could choose was self-destruction.

That is why Chronomon left an egg that would eventually
take his place. And then... you were born.
But I'm not the one who was born from the Egg.{next}
Why are you looking at me?{next}
Do I look like Aegiomon to you?{next}

Do not avert your eyes from the truth. This was all
planned from the beginning.

From our battle with the Titans, to the eventual conflict
involving you humans as well...

...everything is part of the ritual for you to become the
Keeper of Time.

When great powers clash, order becomes distorted.
The chaos this brings about... The rifts in time and space...

Perhaps Chronomon seeks to undo the seal upon himself—
to open the doorway to the Akashic Records that govern order.
Chronomon's final goal... to meet you, his reincarnation.

In reality, though, nothing has been resolved. The Titans
are still on the move.

Chronomon's will still seems to be controlling them.
And they are intent upon invading the human world.
Can't anyone stop this...?
